alert: Payment jobs are moving to the dead-letter queue after transient downstream errors.
root_cause: message queue retry limit too low

evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:message_queue: Message queue logs show jobs dead-lettered after a single retry.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:message_queue:RETRY_LIMIT: Message queue config has RETRY_LIMIT set too low.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:message_queue: Message queue metrics show elevated dead-letter rate without publish failures.

logs: INFO connection pool healthy active=18 max=50

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(message queue retry limit too low, increase retry limit)
distractors: Database logs contain a transient warning, but the persistent failure is queue retry policy.
